title: GIFTS 4 ALL Graveside Memorial Plaque for GRANDAD, RIP Grandad Memory Stone, Grandad Memorial Grave Stone, Grave Ornament Tribute to Grandad
features: Graveside Memorial Stone for Grandad With Poetic Verse
Made From Durable Polyresin & Suitable for Both Indoor & Outdoor Use
Embossed Verse reads "GRANDAD, A golden heart stopped beating, Hard working hands at rest, It broke our hearts to see you go, God only takes the best"
Beautiful & Thoughtful Way to Remember a Beloved Grandad
description: This polyresin heart shaped stone in memory of Grandad has a dark grey & smooth finish and measures 83mm (Height),154mm (Width), 153mm (Depth). The verse reads "GRANDAD, A golden heart stopped beating, Hard working hands at rest, It broke our hearts to see you go, God only takes the best". This memorial stone is suitable for both indoor & outdoor use.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: indoor, outdoor, home decor, garden decor, graveside decor
